articles.title: Building a Cluster-Aware AI Agent with Kubernetes, Argo CD, and GitOps
articles.excerpt: A practical walkthrough of running a self-hosted, read-only AI agent inside a Kubernetes cluster, with the full CI/CD chain handled by GitHub Actions and Argo CD Image Updater. No data leaves the cluster, no cloud AI.

articles.title: Scaling without friction: Aliases at project scope in Boundary
articles.excerpt: In Boundary, a target alias is a simple, powerful tool. It lets you connect to infrastructure using a memorable name instead of a random, generated ID.

articles.title: HCP Vault Dedicated introduces cluster disaster recovery (public preview)
articles.excerpt: HCP Vault Dedicated is a fully managed secrets management solution that organizations rely on for authentication, dynamic secrets, and encryption workflows. As a core piece of security infrastructure, the cost of downtime is too high to leave recovery to chance.
